name: data-access
description: The facts you need to work with team data at all, whatever your stack: ocha-stratus blob/Postgres access + naming, the data semantics that make team tables readable (valid_time vs issued_time, CRS, boundaries), and the third-party humanitarian datasets we already have loaders for. Minimally opinionated — enable in any repo that touches team or humanitarian data.

author.name: OCHA Centre for Humanitarian Data — Data Science
